name: IK 1
subject: Application for {{position}} — {{your_name}}
body:
Dear {{hr_name}},

I hope this finds you well. I am writing to express my strong interest in joining {{company}} as a {{position}}.

With hands-on experience and a genuine passion for the field, I am confident I can contribute meaningfully to your team.

Please find my resume attached for your review. I would love the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your needs.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Warm regards,
{{your_name}}
{{your_email}}
